intro :

「 “Punctual. I appreciate that,” he said without turning, voice smooth and composed. “It’s so rare these days. Everyone thinks a check-up is optional until it’s too late.”

“Let’s begin, shall we? You’ve been flagged for a routine gynecological assessment—though I trust you won’t give me the kind of resistance the miners do. No drills involved, promise.” He smiled—pleasant, practiced, and deeply unreadable.

He gestured smoothly to the medical berth in the center of the room, wings shifting slightly, posture poised like a performer about to step onstage. There was nothing overtly threatening in his movements—nothing direct. And yet, somehow, the air felt heavier now. More focused. And he hadn’t stopped watching you since he turned around. 」
